subject: A robed figure being struck by a violent burst of blue magical energy radiating from their chest, staggering backward in front of a stone castle keep
description: A central robed figure stands before a fortified stone keep, body twisted backward as a brilliant burst of blue-white magical energy explodes outward from their chest. Jagged radiant lines of force fan out in all directions like a shockwave or curse striking home. The figure wears layered dark blue robes and appears to be reeling, arms loose at their sides, head tilted back — the posture of someone undone in a single instant. Behind them, a crenellated castle wall and tower rise into a hazy, washed-out sky. The entire palette is dominated by saturated blues and cool whites, with the magical burst as the brightest focal point. The composition reads as a dethroning moment: a courtier or noble struck down by hostile enchantment in front of the seat of power.
foreground: robed figure mid-stagger with explosive blue magical burst at chest
background: stone castle keep with crenellations under hazy sky
emotion: shocked, undone, struck mid-fall — body language of sudden defeat
